title: Karpatiosorbus schuwerkiorum
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus schuwerkiorum is classified within the family Rosaceae and is a member of the genus Sorbus. It is a species of mountain ash native to the Eastern Carpathians. The specific epithet 'schuwerkiorum' is often used to honor the botanist Schwerdtfeger. Karpatiosorbus schuwerkiorum is closely related to other species within the Sorbus genus. Its classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis.
